description: The chart displays cumulative sums of annual renewable electricity percentages rather than the actual yearly values, making it appear as though Spain's renewable share has grown monotonically to over 400% — an impossibly high figure for a percentage-of-total metric. This completely hides any year-to-year fluctuations or periods of stagnation/decline (such as the dips visible around 2015–2018 in the original data) and grossly exaggerates the apparent trend.
